channel.title: crypto on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in crypto on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: Why Cryptosocial Networks are Needed S1Ep02
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode we are going to go over the criteria and expectations that we think should be included in a Cryptosocial media platform. What we think you should look for in a social media home.
